description: 30 computationally intensive benchmark programs (0.5-10s each) with matching .axm and .c implementations

benchmarks.name: matmul_256
benchmarks.description: 256x256 dense matrix multiplication using flat arrays

benchmarks.name: lu_decomposition
benchmarks.description: LU decomposition of 200x200 matrix via Doolittle algorithm

benchmarks.name: gauss_elimination
benchmarks.description: Gaussian elimination with partial pivoting on 300x301 augmented matrix

benchmarks.name: matrix_inverse_64
benchmarks.description: 64x64 matrix inversion via Gauss-Jordan elimination

benchmarks.name: nbody_3d_1000
benchmarks.description: 3D N-body gravitational simulation: 100 bodies, 1000 timesteps

benchmarks.name: verlet_spring_system
benchmarks.description: Verlet integration for 500 spring-connected particles, 5000 steps

benchmarks.name: heat_equation_1d
benchmarks.description: 1D heat diffusion equation, 10000 points, 5000 timesteps (FTCS)

benchmarks.name: wave_equation_1d
benchmarks.description: 1D wave equation, 10000 points, 5000 timesteps

benchmarks.name: game_of_life
benchmarks.description: Conway's Game of Life on 200x200 toroidal grid, 500 generations

benchmarks.name: fir_filter
benchmarks.description: 64-tap FIR filter applied to 100000 input samples

benchmarks.name: convolution_1d
benchmarks.description: 1D convolution of 10000-element signal with 100-element kernel

benchmarks.name: dft_naive
benchmarks.description: Naive O(n^2) Discrete Fourier Transform on 2048 points

benchmarks.name: quicksort_100k
benchmarks.description: Iterative quicksort on 100000 LCG-generated elements

benchmarks.name: mergesort_100k
benchmarks.description: Bottom-up iterative mergesort on 100000 elements

benchmarks.name: heapsort_100k
benchmarks.description: Heapsort on 100000 LCG-generated elements

benchmarks.name: prime_sieve_10m
benchmarks.description: Sieve of Eratosthenes to 1M, repeated 10 times

benchmarks.name: prime_factorization_heavy
benchmarks.description: Trial division factorization of 1000 large numbers

benchmarks.name: euler_totient_sum_1m
benchmarks.description: Sieve-based Euler totient sum for 1 to 1000000

benchmarks.name: collatz_max_chain
benchmarks.description: Longest Collatz chain for starting values 1 to 1000000

benchmarks.name: pi_chudnovsky_terms
benchmarks.description: Pi via Chudnovsky series (15 terms f64), repeated 500000 times

benchmarks.name: ode_rk4
benchmarks.description: 4th-order Runge-Kutta ODE solver, 1M steps

benchmarks.name: monte_carlo_pi_10m
benchmarks.description: Monte Carlo Pi estimation with 10 million deterministic points

benchmarks.name: numerical_integration_adaptive
benchmarks.description: Composite Simpson's rule on oscillatory function, 500000 panels

benchmarks.name: sha256_inspired
benchmarks.description: SHA-256-inspired hash with integer arithmetic, 100000 blocks

benchmarks.name: lcg_period_test
benchmarks.description: 10M LCG random numbers with statistical analysis (mean, variance, chi-square)

benchmarks.name: jacobi_iteration
benchmarks.description: Jacobi iteration on 500x500 grid, 100 iterations (Laplace equation)

benchmarks.name: stencil_5point
benchmarks.description: 5-point stencil on 1000x1000 grid, 50 iterations

benchmarks.name: blur_box_filter
benchmarks.description: Separable 5-wide box blur on 500x500 image, 10 passes

benchmarks.name: floyd_warshall_200
benchmarks.description: Floyd-Warshall all-pairs shortest path on 200-node graph

benchmarks.name: matrix_chain_order
benchmarks.description: Matrix chain multiplication optimization via DP, n=200
